name: deptrust
desc: deptrust is a CLI that checks package versions for known vulnerabilities across npm, PyPI, crates.io, Go modules, RubyGems, NuGet, Maven, Packagist, pub.dev, C…
descFull: deptrust is a CLI that checks package versions for known vulnerabilities across npm, PyPI, crates.io, Go modules, RubyGems, NuGet, Maven, Packagist, pub.dev, CocoaPods, Hex.pm, Hackage, GitHub Actions, and more.  It runs locally as a CLI and as an MCP server, comes with a skill, and a hook.

hnPosts.title: Show HN: CLI that helps AI agents avoid vulnerable dependencies
